name: Maya Rodriguez
resumeText: Senior Backend Engineer with 5 years of experience building high-throughput APIs. Deep expertise in PostgreSQL including query optimization; partitioning; replication; and writing complex stored procedures. Led the migration of a monolith to microservices serving 2M daily users. Strong in Python (Django/FastAPI) and Go. Known as a highly collaborative team player who pair-programs daily; mentors junior engineers; and runs weekly cross-team architecture syncs. Friendly and energized by working with large groups of stakeholders across product
column5: and data. Drove on-call reliability efforts and cut p99 latency by 40 percent. Comfortable owning projects end to end and communicating clearly with non-technical partners.
